column1: # Source: Azure network round-trip latency statistics (Microsoft Learn)
# Region mapping (per official Microsoft region location documentation):
#   US_West    = West US (California) -- ACTUAL: region physically located in California
#   US_Central = South Central US (San Antonio Texas) -- ACTUAL: region physically located in Texas
#   US_East    = East US (Virginia) -- APPROXIMATION: no Azure region exists in New York; nearest region (Virginia ~500km away) used as proxy. Real NY values would be ~5-8ms higher.
